# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to Mental Health Safety Analyzer.

Please complete the following information before submitting your pull request.


## Description

Describe the changes introduced by this Pull Request.

Explain:

- What was changed?
- Why was this change needed?
- What problem does it solve?


## Type of Change

Select the relevant option:

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Testing improvement


## Related Issue

Link the related issue if available.

Example:

Fixes #123


## Changes Made

List the main changes:

- 
- 
- 

## Testing Performed

Describe the tests you ran.

Example:

Command:

pytest -v


Result:

12/12 tests passed


## Documentation Updates

Have you updated the documentation?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not required


If documentation was updated, mention the files changed.


## Checklist

Before submitting this Pull Request, confirm:

- [ ] The code follows the project coding standards.
- [ ] All tests pass successfully.
- [ ] No sensitive information is included.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if needed.
- [ ] The changes are focused and clearly explained.


## Additional Notes

Add any additional information for reviewers.
